description: Create a 2-Interval Forced Choice (2IFC) pitch discrimination experiment in PsychoPy Builder. The experiment must compare a 440 Hz base frequency against deviant frequencies (442, 445, 450, 460, and 480 Hz). Each trial requires two 400ms pure sine wave tones separated by a 600ms silent gap. The experiment should collect participant responses ('1' if the first tone was higher, '2' if the second tone was higher) and provide "Correct!" or "Wrong" feedback after each response. Generate a 10-row conditions CSV at /home/ga/PsychoPyExperiments/conditions/pitch_conditions.csv that pairs the base frequency with each deviant in both presentation orders, including columns for the frequencies and the correct response. Save the experiment file to /home/ga/PsychoPyExperiments/pitch_discrimination.psyexp.
